sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20630" key="boumolgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βου-μολγός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀμέλγω</etym>) <sense id="n20630.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cowmilking,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.255</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eryc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
